meta.subject: Integrated Science
meta.source: NCDC Primary Seven Curriculum Set One, Integrated Science Syllabus, 8 topics across 4 themes
meta.notes: Mapped from the NCDC P7 Integrated Science topic outline: Term I has Muscular-Skeletal System, Electricity and Magnetism, Energy Resources in the Environment; Term II has Simple Machines and Friction, Excretory System, Light Energy; Term III has Interdependence of Things in the Environment, Population and Health.

topics.name: Muscular-Skeletal System
subTopics: The structure of the human skeleton
Diseases and disorders of bones, muscles and the system
Health habits that keep the system healthy
Prevention of muscular and skeletal diseases

topics.name: Excretory System
subTopics: The human skin: structure, function and care
Diseases and disorders of the human skin
Diseases and disorders of the kidney
Good habits for proper functioning of the system

topics.name: Electricity and Magnetism
subTopics: Safety precautions in handling electricity and electrical appliances
Uses of magnets and the electric bell
Electricity and magnetism in the modern world of work

topics.name: Simple Machines and Friction
subTopics: Useful friction and how to increase it
Friction as a nuisance force and how to reduce it

topics.name: Light Energy
subTopics: Natural and artificial sources of light
Importance of light in the environment
Effects of different materials on light
Common eye defects and their corrections

topics.name: Energy Resources in the Environment
subTopics: The sun as a major source of energy

topics.name: Interdependence of Things in the Environment
subTopics: Interdependence of living and non-living things
Proper harvesting of trees in agroforestry
Managing a school or home wood project

themes.name: The Community, Population and Family Life

topics.name: Population and Health
subTopics: Common sicknesses in a home and their causes
Community health and social problems among young people
Controlling common sicknesses in a home
Collecting information and data on human population
Simple health survey and health data
